page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m2.12xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 48 physical AMD EPYC cores running at a base clock speed of 2.25 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-to-core ratio, this instance provides dedicated execution resources without hyperthreading, ensuring consistent compute performance for multi-threaded tasks.

The instance is configured with 96.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. This 1:2 CPU-to-memory ratio positions the server for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 13 Gbps.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and AMD EPYC architecture offer a predictable performance profile for parallel processing tasks. The absence of bundled local storage and GPUs reduces overhead costs for deployments focused strictly on CPU-bound operations. This hardware profile is suited for workloads such as batch processing, high-performance web serving, distributed compute nodes, and CPU-intensive compilation tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m2.12xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized instance featuring 48 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores running at 2.25 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. It is equipped with 96.0 GB of RAM, providing a 2.0 GB per core memory allocation. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 13 Gbps. It contains no local storage or GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage. This hardware configuration is designed for compute-intensive workloads that require dedicated CPU resources without hyperthreading overhead, making it suitable for batch processing, web serving, and distributed computing tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m2.12xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 48 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 96 GB RAM, and 13 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for CPU-heavy workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m2.12xlarge features 48 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 96 GB RAM, and 13 Gbps network bandwidth for compute-intensive tasks.
tagline: A dedicated 48-core AMD EPYC compute instance with a 1:2 memory-to-CPU ratio for predictable, high-throughput processing.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores with 1.0 thread per core
96.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization on x86_64 architecture
No bundled local storage or GPU hardware
Suited for batch processing, web serving, and distributed compute nodes
